intro_cards.title: Going to Do: に行く
intro_cards.body:
に行く expresses the purpose of going somewhere — 'go to do ~.'

Pattern: [verb stem / noun] + に行く

With verb stem:
• 食べに行く。(Go to eat.)
• 映画を見に行きます。(I'm going to see a movie.)

With verbal noun:
• 買い物に行く。(Go shopping.)
• 勉強しに行く。(Go to study.)

Similar patterns:
• に来る — come to do
• に帰る — go home to do

• 友達に会いに東京に行きます。
(I'm going to Tokyo to meet a friend.)
